description_long: This object depicts two stylized dolls holding hands, each with distinct clothing and hair colors. The doll on the left has light beige skin, long blonde hair tied back, a pale green long-sleeve top, and a black skirt adorned with pink and green floral patterns. The doll on the right has light beige skin, medium-length dark brown hair, a black long-sleeve shirt, and light blue pants. Both dolls have simple, flat facial features with green eyes and small smiles. Their limbs are blocky and geometric, with no visible fingers or toes, and their shoes are black. The overall design is minimalist, with a low-polygon aesthetic and matte finish.
description: Two stylized dolls holding hands, one in a floral skirt and pale top, the other in a black shirt and blue pants, both with simple facial features and blocky limbs.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of both dolls, highlighting the blonde hair tied back and the floral skirt, as well as the dark brown hair and black shirt of the other doll.
description_view_1: Side view focusing on the doll with dark brown hair, black shirt, and blue pants, with the profile of the face and body visible.
description_view_2: Front view displaying both dolls' faces, green eyes, small smiles, and the full detail of their clothing, including the floral skirt and blue pants.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the doll with blonde hair and floral skirt, showing the profile of the head and the length of the skirt.
attribute_clothing_style: The left doll wears a pale green long-sleeve top and a black A-line skirt with pink and green floral patterns, while the right doll wears a black long-sleeve shirt and light blue pants. Both outfits are simple and casual, with no visible brand markings or elaborate details.
attribute_pose: Both dolls are standing upright and holding hands, with arms extended slightly outward to the sides. Their legs are straight and close together, and their heads are facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Both dolls have neutral, simple facial expressions with small, closed smiles and green eyes. There are no visible eyebrows or pronounced emotional cues.
attribute_hair_style: The left doll has long, straight blonde hair tied back in a low ponytail, while the right doll has medium-length, straight dark brown hair with a simple, loose arrangement.
